steps.title: Identify what the constant 2.74 means
steps.content:
The function is $F(x) = 2.74 - 0.19(x - 3)$, where $x$ is the number of months after September 1, 2014. Find the value of $x$ that makes $F(x) = 2.74$:
$$2.74 = 2.74 - 0.19(x - 3)$$
$$0 = -0.19(x - 3)$$
$$x = 3$$

steps.title: Translate $x = 3$ to a date
steps.content: Since $x$ counts months after September 1, $x = 3$ corresponds to December 1, 2014. So 2.74 is the average price per gallon on December 1, 2014. The answer is D.
